proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_enzalutamide have a higher rate of objective_response than those not receiving treatment_enzalutamide.
Patients receiving treatment_abiraterone have a higher rate of objective_response than those not receiving treatment_abiraterone.
Patients receiving treatment_docetaxel have a higher rate of objective_response than those not receiving treatment_docetaxel.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have a higher rate of objective_response than those not receiving treatment_olaparib.
Patients receiving treatment_lu177_psma have a higher rate of objective_response than those not receiving treatment_lu177_psma.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have a higher rate of objective_response than those not receiving treatment_pembrolizumab.

analyses.code: two-proportion z-test of objective_response by treatment_enzalutamide
analyses.result_summary: objective_response rate 0.361 on treatment_enzalutamide (n=20076) vs 0.159 off (n=29924); rate diff +0.2024, p=0.

analyses.code: two-proportion z-test of objective_response by treatment_abiraterone
analyses.result_summary: objective_response rate 0.238 on treatment_abiraterone (n=14991) vs 0.241 off (n=35009); rate diff -0.0031, p=0.463.

analyses.code: two-proportion z-test of objective_response by treatment_docetaxel
analyses.result_summary: objective_response rate 0.240 on treatment_docetaxel (n=15187) vs 0.240 off (n=34813); rate diff -0.0005, p=0.905.

analyses.code: two-proportion z-test of objective_response by treatment_olaparib
analyses.result_summary: objective_response rate 0.239 on treatment_olaparib (n=5098) vs 0.240 off (n=44902); rate diff -0.0010, p=0.872.

analyses.code: two-proportion z-test of objective_response by treatment_lu177_psma
analyses.result_summary: objective_response rate 0.243 on treatment_lu177_psma (n=7504) vs 0.240 off (n=42496); rate diff +0.0029, p=0.59.

analyses.code: two-proportion z-test of objective_response by treatment_pembrolizumab
analyses.result_summary: objective_response rate 0.239 on treatment_pembrolizumab (n=2384) vs 0.240 off (n=47616); rate diff -0.0016, p=0.856.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with brca2_mutation=1 have a different objective_response rate than patients with brca2_mutation=0 (testing whether brca2_mutation status is a marginal predictor of response).
Patients with ar_v7_positive=1 have a different objective_response rate than patients with ar_v7_positive=0 (testing whether ar_v7_positive status is a marginal predictor of response).
Patients with msi_high=1 have a different objective_response rate than patients with msi_high=0 (testing whether msi_high status is a marginal predictor of response).
Patients with psma_high=1 have a different objective_response rate than patients with psma_high=0 (testing whether psma_high status is a marginal predictor of response).

analyses.code: two-proportion z-test of objective_response by brca2_mutation
analyses.result_summary: response rate 0.150 when brca2_mutation=1 vs 0.250 when brca2_mutation=0; diff -0.1005 (p=0).

analyses.code: two-proportion z-test of objective_response by ar_v7_positive
analyses.result_summary: response rate 0.160 when ar_v7_positive=1 vs 0.260 when ar_v7_positive=0; diff -0.1005 (p=0).

analyses.code: two-proportion z-test of objective_response by msi_high
analyses.result_summary: response rate 0.176 when msi_high=1 vs 0.242 when msi_high=0; diff -0.0662 (p=2.47e-09).

analyses.code: two-proportion z-test of objective_response by psma_high
analyses.result_summary: response rate 0.239 when psma_high=1 vs 0.243 when psma_high=0; diff -0.0040 (p=0.3).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps is associated with a lower objective_response rate.
Patients with mcrpc=1 have a lower objective_response rate than patients with mcrpc=0.
Patients with visceral_mets=1 have a different objective_response rate than patients with visceral_mets=0.
Higher gleason_score (>=9) is associated with a lower objective_response rate than lower gleason_score (<=7).
Older age_years is associated with a lower objective_response rate.

analyses.code: chi-square of ecog_ps x objective_response
analyses.result_summary: response rate by ecog_ps: 0=0.282, 1=0.228, 2=0.182; chi-square p=5.37e-72; monotonic decrease.

analyses.code: two-proportion z-test of objective_response by mcrpc
analyses.result_summary: mCRPC=1 rate 0.154 vs mCRPC=0 rate 0.346; diff -0.1925, p=0.

analyses.code: two-proportion z-test by visceral_mets
analyses.result_summary: visceral_mets=1 rate 0.240 vs =0 rate 0.240; diff -0.0008, p=0.86.

analyses.code: compare response rates between gleason>=9 and gleason<=7; chi-square overall
analyses.result_summary: response rate gleason>=9: 0.242 vs gleason<=7: 0.238; chi-square across categories p=0.77.

analyses.code: logistic regression of objective_response on age_years
analyses.result_summary: univariable logistic age_years beta +0.0002 (OR 1.000, p=0.82).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher psa_ng_ml is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative beta in logistic regression).
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with a higher objective_response rate (positive beta in logistic regression).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative beta in logistic regression).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative beta in logistic regression).
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative beta in logistic regression).
Higher nlr is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative beta in logistic regression).
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with a higher objective_response rate (positive beta in logistic regression).
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative beta in logistic regression).
Higher ast_u_l is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative beta in logistic regression).
Higher alt_u_l is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative beta in logistic regression).
Higher total_bilirubin_mg_dl is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative beta in logistic regression).
Higher creatinine_mg_dl is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative beta in logistic regression).
Higher bun_mg_dl is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative beta in logistic regression).
sodium_meq_l is associated with objective_response (non-zero beta in logistic regression).
potassium_meq_l is associated with objective_response (non-zero beta in logistic regression).
Higher calcium_mg_dl is associated with a lower objective_response rate (negative beta in logistic regression).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Olaparib increases objective_response more in BRCA2-mutated patients than in BRCA2 wildtype (positive treatment-by-biomarker interaction).
Pembrolizumab increases objective_response more in MSI-high patients than in MSI-low patients (positive treatment-by-biomarker interaction).
Lu-177-PSMA increases objective_response more in PSMA-high patients than in PSMA-low patients (positive treatment-by-biomarker interaction).
Enzalutamide's increase in objective_response is attenuated in AR-V7-positive patients (negative treatment-by-biomarker interaction).
Enzalutamide's increase in objective_response is attenuated in BRCA2-mutated patients (negative treatment-by-biomarker interaction).
Enzalutamide's increase in objective_response is attenuated in MSI-high patients (negative treatment-by-biomarker interaction).

analyses.code: sm.Logit(objective_response ~ treatment_olaparib + brca2_mutation + treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation)
analyses.result_summary: interaction beta -0.289 (p=0.045); stratified rate diff in brca2_mutation=1: -0.032 (p=0.0501); in brca2_mutation=0: +0.003 (p=0.652).

analyses.code: sm.Logit(objective_response ~ treatment_pembrolizumab + msi_high + treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high)
analyses.result_summary: interaction beta +0.017 (p=0.956); stratified rate diff in msi_high=1: +0.001 (p=0.978); in msi_high=0: -0.002 (p=0.867).

analyses.code: sm.Logit(objective_response ~ treatment_lu177_psma + psma_high + treatment_lu177_psma:psma_high)
analyses.result_summary: interaction beta -0.054 (p=0.363); stratified rate diff in psma_high=1: -0.001 (p=0.868); in psma_high=0: +0.009 (p=0.295).

analyses.code: sm.Logit(objective_response ~ treatment_enzalutamide + ar_v7_positive + treatment_enzalutamide:ar_v7_positive)
analyses.result_summary: interaction beta -1.237 (p=1.39e-93); stratified rate diff in ar_v7_positive=1: +0.008 (p=0.257); in ar_v7_positive=0: +0.251 (p=0).

analyses.code: sm.Logit(objective_response ~ treatment_enzalutamide + brca2_mutation + treatment_enzalutamide:brca2_mutation)
analyses.result_summary: interaction beta -1.138 (p=3.32e-42); stratified rate diff in brca2_mutation=1: +0.006 (p=0.539); in brca2_mutation=0: +0.225 (p=0).

analyses.code: sm.Logit(objective_response ~ treatment_enzalutamide + msi_high + treatment_enzalutamide:msi_high)
analyses.result_summary: interaction beta -1.283 (p=1.76e-19); stratified rate diff in msi_high=1: -0.022 (p=0.272); in msi_high=0: +0.209 (p=0).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Enzalutamide's increase in objective_response is attenuated in mcrpc=1 patients (negative treatment-by-mcrpc interaction).
Enzalutamide's effect on objective_response differs between ecog_ps>=2 and ecog_ps<2 (non-zero interaction).
Lu-177-PSMA's effect on objective_response is attenuated in patients with visceral_mets=1 (negative interaction).
Lu-177-PSMA increases objective_response more in patients with gleason_score>=9 (positive interaction).
Pembrolizumab increases objective_response more in patients with gleason_score>=9 (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: interaction beta -1.978 (p=0); in mcrpc=1 rate diff +0.008 (p=0.0844); in mcrpc=0 rate diff +0.440 (p=0).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_enzalutamide on objective_response varies with psa_ng_ml (non-zero interaction term in logistic regression).
The effect of treatment_docetaxel on objective_response varies with sodium_meq_l (non-zero interaction term in logistic regression).
The effect of treatment_docetaxel on objective_response varies with alt_u_l (non-zero interaction term in logistic regression).
The effect of treatment_olaparib on objective_response varies with bun_mg_dl (non-zero interaction term in logistic regression).
The effect of treatment_enzalutamide on objective_response varies with creatinine_mg_dl (non-zero interaction term in logistic regression).
The effect of treatment_lu177_psma on objective_response varies with creatinine_mg_dl (non-zero interaction term in logistic regression).

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_enzalutamide retains an independent positive association with objective_response after adjusting for age, ecog_ps, mcrpc, visceral_mets, gleason_score, all biomarkers, all labs, and other treatments (positive beta in multivariable logistic regression).

Other treatments (treatment_abiraterone, treatment_docetaxel, treatment_olaparib, treatment_lu177_psma, treatment_pembrolizumab) are not significantly associated with objective_response after adjustment.
After adjusting for treatment and demographics, mcrpc=1 retains an independent negative association with objective_response.
After adjustment, brca2_mutation, ar_v7_positive, and msi_high retain negative independent associations with objective_response.

analyses.code: sm.Logit(objective_response ~ all features) full model
analyses.result_summary: adjusted treatment_enzalutamide beta +1.201 (OR 3.324, p=0).

analyses.code: sm.Logit full model -- coefficients of non-enzalutamide treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted other-treatment effects: treatment_abiraterone beta -0.025 (p=0.311); treatment_docetaxel beta +0.002 (p=0.947); treatment_olaparib beta +0.026 (p=0.494); treatment_lu177_psma beta +0.029 (p=0.35); treatment_pembrolizumab beta +0.014 (p=0.786).

analyses.code: sm.Logit full model -- mcrpc coefficient
analyses.result_summary: adjusted mcrpc beta -1.126 (OR 0.324, p=0).

analyses.code: sm.Logit full model -- biomarker coefficients
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted biomarker effects: brca2_mutation beta -0.735 (p=5.04e-64); ar_v7_positive beta -0.694 (p=1.14e-108); msi_high beta -0.431 (p=2.54e-09).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_enzalutamide on objective_response is heterogeneous across patient subgroups defined by single binary features (any modifier with non-zero treatment-by-modifier interaction, found by systematic screening across all 30+ binarized features).

The effect of treatment_abiraterone on objective_response is heterogeneous across patient subgroups defined by single binary features (any modifier with non-zero treatment-by-modifier interaction, found by systematic screening across all 30+ binarized features).

The effect of treatment_docetaxel on objective_response is heterogeneous across patient subgroups defined by single binary features (any modifier with non-zero treatment-by-modifier interaction, found by systematic screening across all 30+ binarized features).

The effect of treatment_olaparib on objective_response is heterogeneous across patient subgroups defined by single binary features (any modifier with non-zero treatment-by-modifier interaction, found by systematic screening across all 30+ binarized features).

The effect of treatment_lu177_psma on objective_response is heterogeneous across patient subgroups defined by single binary features (any modifier with non-zero treatment-by-modifier interaction, found by systematic screening across all 30+ binarized features).

The effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response is heterogeneous across patient subgroups defined by single binary features (any modifier with non-zero treatment-by-modifier interaction, found by systematic screening across all 30+ binarized features).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Olaparib's effect on objective_response is concentrated in a two-feature subgroup.
Pembrolizumab's effect on objective_response is concentrated in a two-feature subgroup.
Lu-177-PSMA's effect on objective_response is concentrated in a two-feature subgroup.
Enzalutamide's effect on objective_response is concentrated in a two-feature subgroup, with the largest effect among non-mCRPC, low-burden patients.
Abiraterone's effect on objective_response is concentrated in a two-feature subgroup.
Docetaxel's effect on objective_response is concentrated in a two-feature subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Enzalutamide's effect on objective_response is larger in lower-PSA quartiles than in higher-PSA quartiles.
Enzalutamide's effect on objective_response is larger in higher-albumin quartiles.
Enzalutamide's effect on objective_response varies across LDH quartiles.

analyses.code: qcut(psa_ng_ml,4) and within each quartile run two_prop on treatment_enzalutamide
qcut(albumin_g_dl,4) and within each quartile run two_prop on treatment_enzalutamide
qcut(ldh_u_l,4) and within each quartile run two_prop on treatment_enzalutamide

proposed_hypotheses.text: In the subgroup defined by brca2_mutation AND ecog_le1, treatment_olaparib increases objective_response more than treatment_olaparib does in the complementary group (positive within-subgroup rate difference).

In the subgroup defined by msi_high AND ecog_le1 AND albumin_ok, treatment_pembrolizumab increases objective_response more than treatment_pembrolizumab does in the complementary group (positive within-subgroup rate difference).

In the subgroup defined by psma_high AND albumin_ok, treatment_lu177_psma increases objective_response more than treatment_lu177_psma does in the complementary group (positive within-subgroup rate difference).

In the subgroup defined by no_visceral, treatment_enzalutamide increases objective_response more than treatment_enzalutamide does in the complementary group (positive within-subgroup rate difference).
In the subgroup defined by no_visceral, treatment_abiraterone increases objective_response more than treatment_abiraterone does in the complementary group (positive within-subgroup rate difference).
In the subgroup defined by albumin_ok, treatment_docetaxel increases objective_response more than treatment_docetaxel does in the complementary group (positive within-subgroup rate difference).

analyses.code: for each candidate predicate set, run two_prop(df[predicates], treatment_olaparib)
analyses.result_summary: per definition results: brca2_mutation: n=4996, diff=-0.032 (p=0.0501); brca2_mutation+ecog_le1: n=4223, diff=-0.047 (p=0.0103); brca2_mutation+albumin_ok: n=2736, diff=-0.012 (p=0.614); brca2_mutation+ecog_le1+albumin_ok: n=2301, diff=-0.032 (p=0.214); brca2_mutation+no_visceral: n=4002, diff=-0.032 (p=0.08). Best: brca2_mutation & ecog_le1.

Best: msi_high & ecog_le1 & albumin_ok.

analyses.result_summary: per definition results: psma_high: n=29962, diff=-0.001 (p=0.868); psma_high+ecog_le1: n=25503, diff=+0.003 (p=0.728); psma_high+albumin_ok: n=16279, diff=-0.009 (p=0.329); psma_high+ecog_le1+albumin_ok: n=13843, diff=+0.002 (p=0.825); psma_high+no_visceral: n=23941, diff=+0.004 (p=0.636). Best: psma_high & albumin_ok.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among brca2_mutation=1 patients, treatment_olaparib does NOT increase objective_response (within-subgroup rate difference is non-positive); the effect is not concentrated in the canonical BRCA2-positive group.
Among msi_high=1 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab does NOT meaningfully increase objective_response (within-subgroup rate difference is near zero).
Among psma_high=1 patients, treatment_lu177_psma does NOT meaningfully increase objective_response (within-subgroup rate difference is near zero).

analyses.code: two_prop on df[brca2_mutation==1] for treatment_olaparib; and on df[brca2_mutation==0]
analyses.result_summary: In brca2_mutation=1 (n=4996): rate_T=0.121 rate_C=0.153 diff=-0.0321 (p=0.0501). In brca2_mutation=0 (n=45004): rate_T=0.253 rate_C=0.250 diff=+0.0031 (p=0.652).

analyses.code: two_prop on df[msi_high==1] for treatment_pembrolizumab; and on df[msi_high==0]
two_prop on df[psma_high==1] for treatment_lu177_psma; and on df[psma_high==0]

proposed_hypotheses.text: Even after adjustment for age, ecog_ps, mcrpc, visceral_mets, gleason_score, and key labs, the treatment_olaparib by brca2_mutation interaction term is not significantly positive.
Even after adjustment for age, ecog_ps, mcrpc, visceral_mets, gleason_score, and key labs, the treatment_pembrolizumab by msi_high interaction term is not significantly positive.
Even after adjustment for age, ecog_ps, mcrpc, visceral_mets, gleason_score, and key labs, the treatment_lu177_psma by psma_high interaction term is not significantly positive.

analyses.code: sm.Logit(obj_resp ~ treatment_olaparib + brca2_mutation + treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation + age_years + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + gleason_score + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + alkaline_phosphatase_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + psa_ng_ml + nlr + crp_mg_l)
analyses.result_summary: adjusted interaction beta -0.273 (p=0.0628); main treatment_olaparib beta +0.020 (p=0.597); main brca2_mutation beta -0.653 (p=1.67e-49).

analyses.code: sm.Logit(obj_resp ~ treatment_pembrolizumab + msi_high + treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high + age_years + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + gleason_score + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + alkaline_phosphatase_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + psa_ng_ml + nlr + crp_mg_l)
analyses.result_summary: adjusted interaction beta +0.073 (p=0.817); main treatment_pembrolizumab beta -0.021 (p=0.676); main msi_high beta -0.432 (p=1.49e-09).

analyses.code: sm.Logit(obj_resp ~ treatment_lu177_psma + psma_high + treatment_lu177_psma:psma_high + age_years + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + gleason_score + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + alkaline_phosphatase_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + psa_ng_ml + nlr + crp_mg_l)
analyses.result_summary: adjusted interaction beta -0.064 (p=0.295); main treatment_lu177_psma beta +0.064 (p=0.176); main psma_high beta -0.022 (p=0.349).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving more concurrent treatments have a higher objective_response rate (positive correlation between number of treatments and response rate).
Patients receiving both treatment_enzalutamide and treatment_abiraterone have a different objective_response rate than patients receiving only one of them.

analyses.code: df['n_tx'] = sum(treatment indicators); chi-square of n_tx x objective_response
compare obj_resp rate between (enza=1 & abi=1) and (enza=1 & abi=0)
analyses.result_summary: both: n=6059, rr=0.357; only_enza: n=14017, rr=0.363; only_abi: n=8932, rr=0.157; neither: n=20992, rr=0.160. both-vs-only-enza diff -0.006 (p=0.431).

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_enzalutamide increases objective_response only in the complete subgroup defined by mcrpc=0 AND ar_v7_positive=0 AND brca2_mutation=0 AND msi_high=0; outside this subgroup the rate difference is near zero. The unfavorable values mcrpc=1, ar_v7_positive=1, brca2_mutation=1, and msi_high=1 each independently suppress the enzalutamide treatment effect.
Within the non-mCRPC stratum, each of ar_v7_positive=1, brca2_mutation=1, and msi_high=1 individually nullifies the otherwise large treatment_enzalutamide benefit on objective_response.

analyses.code: two_prop on df[mcrpc==0 & ar_v7_positive==0 & brca2_mutation==0 & msi_high==0] for treatment_enzalutamide; same on complement
analyses.result_summary: INSIDE (n=15681, T=6325, C=9356): rate_T=0.798 rate_C=0.172 diff=+0.6257 (p=0); OUTSIDE (n=34319, T=13751, C=20568): rate_T=0.161 rate_C=0.153 diff=+0.0077 (p=0.0545). Effect concentrated in subgroup.

analyses.code: within mcrpc==0, stratify by each of ar_v7_positive, brca2_mutation, msi_high
